source: 四级写作真题合集（2015-2025年6月）.pdf

title: 大学英语四级写作真题 2025-06 第3套
prompt_text: Suppose your university is organizing a forum on the development of students cross-cultural communication abilities. You are now to write an essay to express your view. You will have 30 minutes to write the essay. You should write at least 120 words but no more than 180 words.
source: 四级写作真题合集（2015-2025年6月）.pdf
